name: v2-external-architecture-r1
purpose: 120-task external architecture split from compact behavioral analog model patterns.
storage_rule: Keep these tasks under benchmark-v2/tasks until gold EVAS and Spectre validation are reviewed.

tasks.prompt_strategy: Convert a sensor level into a digital-like voltage decision using threshold behavior.
Classify a sensor voltage into below/inside/above window flags.
Model a bounded analog transfer that follows midrange input but clamps outside lower and upper limits.
Convert each rising event into a finite-width voltage pulse and return low after the pulse window.
Convert a sensor level into a digital-like voltage decision using threshold behavior.
